title: neonauclea nicobarica
intro: Neonauclea nicobarica, also known as Nicobar Nauclea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, native to the Nicobar Islands in the Indian Ocean. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neonauclea nicobarica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
